modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty restoring archived videos in Panopto.

full_description_text: The user is attempting to restore a video that has been archived in Panopto. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this process. This issue is impacting their ability to access previously recorded content.

description: The user is attempting to restore a video that has been archived in Panopto. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this process. This issue is impacting their ability to access previously recorded content.
